name: Smart Business Report
tagline: Clean AI-era business report with stacked cards, pastel panels, polished status layouts, and SaaS report hierarchy.

palette.description: white and pale blue SaaS surface with cyan buttons, purple panels, and yellow highlight blocks

best_for: Business updates, marketing status reports, SaaS reviews, and polished internal reporting where friendliness and clarity matter.
avoid_for: Dark technical demos, luxury editorial work, or highly expressive youth-culture decks.

source_inspiration.name: Beautiful.ai Presentation Template Gallery
source_inspiration.notes: Independent HTML/CSS interpretation based on public visual reference; not a pixel copy and does not reuse source assets.
